text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

On 2009-11-08T11:29:46-0800, Kenyon Ralph <kenyon@kenyonralph.com> wrote:
> On 2009-11-07T21:04:17-0800, Kenyon Ralph <kenyon@kenyonralph.com> wrote:
> > On 2009-11-06T22:24:37+0100, dinoex@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> > > I can't reproduce your problem.
> > > Please provide more info.
> > 
> > Strange. I'll try soon on a fresh install of FreeBSD 8. I've already
> > tried deleting all my installed ports and then installing graphviz; this
> > problem still occurs.
> 
> I built graphviz in a fresh installation of FreeBSD 8 RC2 in a virtual
> machine, and dot worked properly, it gave a list of output formats. The
> main difference I can see is that my problematic machine has perl5.10
> installed instead of the default of perl5.8. I don't know why that would
> cause this problem. I'll try deleting all the ports on the problematic
> machine and starting over with perl5.8.

This report can be closed. Must have been a problem local to my machine,
because I reinstalled from 8.0-RC2 media, built graphviz, and dot worked
properly. Apologies for the erroneous report.

- -- 
Kenyon Ralph
